I have started a PhD [Rosalind Franklin Institute](https://www.rfi.ac.uk/) with some professional experience at [NEST Pensions](https://www.nestpensions.org.uk/schemeweb/nest.html) and [LCP](https://www.lcpproperties.co.uk/). I am working with [Dr Amirafshar Moshtaghpour](https://www.rfi.ac.uk/our-people/amirafshar-moshtaghpour/) and [Professor Mike Davies](https://eng.ed.ac.uk/about/people/professor-michael-e-davies) on inverse problems, deep learning and their applications to electron microscopy. Before then I worked on a predecessor to VisualPDE: a rapid-interactive PDE solver that has been featured in the Bulletin of Mathematical Biology! Click below to play around.
<iframe title="VisualPDE simulation" style="border:0;width:62%;height:100%;" src="https://visualpde.com/sim/?-wlFShsNgwNkj2O6ne49Xs4BIA7GIwxPL7PGZ70njoGUL0v8IzKkGOzpNgs74nAP57oy3TYL2JBplu4HPr+tr2vid4hpoAAsyCGiQqTdNBzDlnC0bpoWyB4cBiipMwlL0CQMDGCA1TUsRjykIwtTIJUGRsbwHEGiATQUMMtxWnBn7zsgoniUQuBsZWIAyRAEl1g2Jb4oYhLKap1ITHS0liSpcmrBk2DUbR2wUvRjE9DCNCtLg0HoN0cHAcsUwZBgZGZmaExTLM8yLB5awbFsuwIoc-nTI5zmwBkNDYFgpAhdgvJfD0KzYNKGUgPgQ5ECOcxNiAOggDsODYJQAAS2CpBg2w0MypCnhId7IGJKAjBAMzriQzA+eO4LbEQDnDG69nBcg6S+nSAC+BTIOCA2wEsS0xmteWpJUrQ4qysDMtsM2BBs0wQBgFjgji2wWCgkyzg0zCHse2IaXNQA&logo_only" frameborder="0"></iframe>

In the several months between updating this page I like to say what I've been reading but upsettingly it has just been papers.
<!-- I got halfway through _Essential Topology_ (by Martin Crossley) - it was a fun book, but Lyra's adventures in Oxford have taken over my interests now. -->
<!-- I'm currently reading _Essential Topology_ (by Martin Crossley) on a whim. I saw it on Waterstones and thought to myself time would be better spent in the fantasy section but here we are. -->
